coverage: 250/250 papers have source_url; source domains: github.com
report_or_slide_use: Use when introducing the dataset and explaining that the project visualizes a public Test-of-Time award seed.
copy_ready_citation_note: Award-paper membership and award timing come from the public Test of Time Awards seed used by the influence-dispersion repository; rows without complete timing metadata were excluded before frontend analysis.
careful_wording_boundary: Describe current seed coverage, not all CS long-term-impact papers or venue quality rankings.
remaining_human_check: Before final submission, verify the source URL opens and cite it in the report reference list.

coverage: 245/250 papers have paper_url; 193/250 have DOI; visible paper domains include: arxiv.org; bnrg.eecs.berkeley.edu; citeseerx.ist.psu.edu; constraint-programming.net; dblp.uni-trier.de; digital.library.wisc.edu
report_or_slide_use: Use for representative-paper evidence cards and paper-specific citations.
copy_ready_citation_note: Representative paper titles are linked to DOI, ACM, IEEE, DBLP, or other public paper pages when available.
careful_wording_boundary: Paper links identify source records; they do not by themselves prove contribution or industrial adoption claims.
remaining_human_check: For final selected cases, open the paper/DOI page and confirm title/venue/year before writing case prose.

primary_file_or_doc: data/papers_enriched.csv fields openalex_id, citation_count, concepts, institutions, countries
coverage: 248/250 papers have OpenAlex IDs; 250/250 have citation_count values
report_or_slide_use: Use for aggregate citation depth, topic metadata, institution/country visibility, and same-dataset comparisons.
copy_ready_citation_note: Citation, topic, institution, and country fields are enriched from public scholarly metadata and used as descriptive proxies for patterns inside this 250-paper dataset.
careful_wording_boundary: Do not call OpenAlex-derived metrics official award reasons, complete citation graphs, or cross-field paper-quality rankings.
remaining_human_check: Keep proxy wording in report/PPT; manually verify any single-paper contribution claim.

coverage: 3077 yearly citation rows covering 248 paper_ids; breadth sample available for 248/250 papers
report_or_slide_use: Use for trajectory shape, citation-window discussion, impact breadth proxy, and E-module case selection.
copy_ready_citation_note: Citation trajectories and impact breadth scores are derived from public metadata snapshots and sampled citing-work fields, then summarized for visualization.
careful_wording_boundary: Treat breadth as sampled proxy and trajectory as observed-window metadata, not causal proof of award effect or complete lifetime history.
remaining_human_check: When selecting cases, pair proxy metrics with evidence URLs or paper reading notes.

coverage: Top 12 template rows: 12; evidence_url_1 present: 12/12; evidence_url_2 present: 12/12; checked flag complete: 0/12
report_or_slide_use: Use for final case-card wording, contribution explanations, and industry/foundational impact notes.
copy_ready_citation_note: Manual evidence rows are the layer for paper-specific contribution and impact wording; final report claims should cite the attached evidence URLs.
careful_wording_boundary: Do not present unchecked manual notes as final facts; distinguish evidence-ready cautious cases from cases needing final reading.
remaining_human_check: Open each selected evidence URL and mark the manual row checked before final report or PPT use.

coverage: Documentation layer links source, proxy, uncertainty, and final evidence checks across B-F modules.
report_or_slide_use: Use as the Methods and Limitations appendix backbone.
copy_ready_citation_note: The report should state that award seed rows, public metadata, derived metrics, and manual evidence serve different evidentiary roles.
careful_wording_boundary: Do not collapse data provenance, metric definitions, and human evidence into one undifferentiated source claim.
remaining_human_check: Before submission, compare final report wording against the provenance audit and evidence queue.
